message: Stage -1.2 drafted angle=0 v1 mode=cold-start runner=claude/opus status=completed

Stage 0.k surfaced 1 proposed assumption(s) (layer 6 Bucket A hook). Review and decide whether to grant or theorem-split:
  - conjecture "inference" needs assumption [ass:inference-regularity] (latent): Section 11 cannot define Phi_lambda, the active sets A_L/A_U, or the derivative formula without the finite branch maps, and the first CLT display cannot close without the primitive i.i.d. sampling statement. The condition applies only to the observed cells and the fixed lambda/regime actually used in the proof. Removing it does not make the closest prior results prove the headline: FangSantos2019DirectionallyDifferentiable supplies the delta method after a directionally differentiable map is available, and ChernozhukovHongTamer2007ParameterSets supplies set-level inversion after an endpoint limit law is available; neither derives this leaky front-door vertex representation from the original assumptions.

To grant a caveat/latent: append to state.added_assumptions with user_approved=true, set flags.rewind_to_stage0_k=<comma-separated conjecture labels>, then resume.
To theorem-split a regime_defining: redraft the Stage -1.2 proposal to split the affected conjecture; set state.stage_completed=-1.1 and resume.

Review boundary stage_0.5_to_0 routed to stage_0 (reject fast-path): Case 2(2c) regime_defining theorem-split (over Case 6b stage_neg1, which fails because the proposal is salvageable: part (a), conj:vertex, conj:inference all reproduce; only conj:nondecomp (b)-(c) is false). Regression pattern (a): same nondecomp counterexample flagged in both reviews (revise then reject) — a stable, localized conjecture-level defect with a named fix, not wandering. The {κ(P)≠0} regime is the wrong characterization (counterexample has κ=1/2 yet no strict inclusion when q_{·|1}=q_{·|0}); the true regime additionally needs an active mediator channel q_{·|1}≠q_{·|0}. Over-precision test (2a') fails (this restricts WHICH laws, not an attainment/closure form), so split rather than statement_correction. loop_guard clear (theorem_splits=0); split is not collapsed (conditional strict inclusion still requires the shared-U LP/compatibility argument).

Stage 0.M validator rejected the stitch: dangling reference \ref{eq:vlp}: no matching \label{eq:vlp} in the document. Define the referenced object (e.g. emit the missing \begin{...}\label{eq:vlp}...\end{...} environment) or remove the citation.
